cmd.app_tour_done: Starting the tour — use Next to walk through.
cmd.app_tour_hint: A guided tour of the main features
cmd.clear_my_answers_done: Confirm in the dialog to clear your answers.
cmd.clear_my_answers_hint: Reset your responses on this activity
cmd.clear_workspace_hint: Removes the current content and history — asks first
cmd.create_activity_rubric: Create a rubric for this activity
cmd.create_activity_rubric_failed: The activity rubric could not be created.
cmd.create_lesson: Create a lesson (tell me the topic)
cmd.create_lesson_done3: — AlloBot will guide the next steps.
cmd.create_lesson_done_blank: Starting the guided lesson flow — AlloBot will ask for your topic.
cmd.create_lesson_hint: Starts the guided flow — say a topic and grade
cmd.cycle_reading_theme_hint: Cycle warm, sepia, dark, dyslexia-friendly, and more
cmd.edit_assignment_directions_hint: Open the directions and goals composer
cmd.export_pack_hint: Download the lesson as a self-contained file
cmd.failed: That command is no longer available here.
cmd.find_reading_done: I found a good match and opened it
cmd.find_reading_hint: Ask by topic, grade, language, source, or type
cmd.find_reading_none: I opened the Reading Library, but I could not find a strong match yet
cmd.generate_analysis_hint: Run a source analysis on the current content
cmd.generate_glossary_hint: Generate a glossary from the current content
cmd.generate_outline_hint: Generate an outline from the current content
cmd.generate_quiz_done: Generating a quiz from this content…
cmd.generate_quiz_hint: Generate a quiz from the current content
cmd.generate_quiz_ready: Quiz ready — it’s in the output panel.
cmd.generate_sentence_frames_hint: Generate sentence frames from the current content
cmd.generate_simplified_hint: Generate a simpler reading level — say “to grade N” for a target
cmd.go_dashboard_hint: Back to the main lesson view
cmd.launch_flashcards_hint: Study this glossary as a flashcard deck
cmd.next_assignment_step_hint: Open the recommended next activity or goal
cmd.open_allo_studio_hint: Design accessible posters, flyers, and worksheets
cmd.open_assessment_builder_hint: Design an assessment and supporting activities
cmd.open_class_session_hint: Start or join a live class session
cmd.open_educator_hub_done: Educator Hub opened — the Document Pipeline card is near the top.
cmd.open_educator_hub_hint: Lesson tools + the Document Pipeline card
cmd.open_free_forms_hint: Build your own 3D World of Forms
cmd.open_lingua_practice_hint: Practice vocabulary and language from the current source
cmd.open_live_poll_done: Live poll composer opened. Review it, then broadcast from there.
cmd.open_live_poll_hint: Compose a live poll for the active session
cmd.open_live_session_center_hint: Polls, groups, Pictionary, and session controls
cmd.open_lumen_done: Lumen opened in the STEM Lab.
cmd.open_mind_map_hint: Map concepts, lessons, and unit connections
cmd.open_open_groove_hint: Make beats, synth patterns, and notation-aware music
cmd.open_persona_chat_hint: Interview an AI persona about this topic
cmd.open_pictionary_host_done: Concept Pictionary opened. Choose a concept and start the round from there.
cmd.open_pictionary_host_hint: Open the teacher host for Concept Pictionary
cmd.open_project_settings_hint: Per-project AI, dictation, and Socratic gating
cmd.open_quick_check_done: Quick Check opened. Review it, then broadcast from there.
cmd.open_reading_library_hint: Browse open picture books in 10 languages
cmd.open_research_hub_hint: Find and organize credible research sources
cmd.open_source_input_hint: Paste, write, search, or generate source material
cmd.open_source_url_hint: Paste a URL or search for a source
cmd.open_student_signal_done: Teacher signal panel opened. Pick one option to send.
cmd.open_student_signal_hint: Tell the teacher you need help, more time, or are ready
cmd.open_test_prep_hub_hint: Open free practice sets and study tools
cmd.open_udl_guide_hint: Review UDL supports for the current lesson
cmd.pipeline_downloads_done: Downloads section — the tagged PDF is the share-ready copy.
cmd.pipeline_fix_again_hint: Another remediation pass to push the score higher
cmd.pipeline_jump_miss: That section isn’t on screen right now.
cmd.pipeline_new_doc: Start over with a new document
cmd.pipeline_new_doc_done: Cleared — upload a new document to begin.
cmd.pipeline_new_doc_hint: Clear this result and upload a new file
cmd.pipeline_stop_hint: Stop after the current round — keeps what’s done
cmd.pipeline_tour_hint: A 60-second tour of the remediation results
cmd.preview_assignment_as_student: Preview the shared assignment as a student
cmd.preview_assignment_as_student_done: Student preview opened in a new tab.
cmd.preview_assignment_as_student_hint: Open the latest shared link in a separate student tab
cmd.read_assignment_directions_hint: Open the directions and start read-aloud
cmd.read_this_page_done: Page reader opened — choose where to start.
cmd.resume_latest_work_hint: Open the most recent saved item directly
cmd.resume_latest_work_none: No saved work is available yet.
cmd.review_teacher_feedback_hint: Hear returned feedback when it is available
cmd.review_teacher_feedback_none: No returned teacher feedback is available yet.
cmd.send_teacher_signal_failed: The signal could not be sent. Check the live session and try again.
cmd.send_teacher_signal_hint: Send one private, fixed-choice signal in the live session
cmd.set_font_size: Set the text size (say a number)
cmd.set_output_language_hint: Set the language used for generated resources
cmd.set_source_length_hint: Short, medium, long, or a word count
cmd.set_source_tone_hint: Informative, narrative, dialogue, persuasive, humorous, or step-by-step
cmd.set_ui_language_done: Pointed you to the language picker in the header — choose your language there.
cmd.set_ui_language_hint: Jump to the language picker in the header
cmd.set_ui_language_miss: The interface-language picker is in the top menu bar.
cmd.share_assignment_confirm: Create a student link containing {count} resource(s), expiring in {days} day(s). {ai} Press Enter again to confirm.
cmd.share_assignment_confirm_ai_byok: Students may connect their own AI provider.
cmd.share_assignment_failed: The student assignment link was not created.
cmd.share_assignment_hint: Create a student-facing homework link after confirmation
cmd.show_success_criteria_hint: Hear the assignment goals or current rubric criteria
cmd.show_success_criteria_none: No success criteria are available yet.
cmd.submit_work_hint: Send your work to your teacher
cmd.switch_theme: Switch the theme (light / dark / high contrast)
cmd.switch_theme_done: Theme switched — cycling light, then dark, then high contrast.
cmd.toggle_cloud_sync: Turn cloud sync on or off
cmd.toggle_cloud_sync_consent: Opening the cloud-sync consent dialog — confirm there to turn it on.
cmd.toggle_cloud_sync_hint: Sync your work to the cloud (asks consent the first time)
cmd.toggle_color_overlay_hint: Cycle a soft colored tint over the page
cmd.toggle_help_mode_done: Help mode toggled — click any control to learn about it.
cmd.toggle_help_mode_hint: Click anything to learn what it does
cmd.toggle_line_focus_hint: Highlight one line at a time
cmd.toggle_reading_ruler_hint: A movable line guide for tracking
cmd.translate_document_done2: and spotlighted the button — press Translate to run it. (Translations use AI quota, so the click stays yours.)
cmd.translate_document_hint: Pre-fills the language and points at the button
cmd.translate_document_pick: Spotlighted the translation controls — pick a language and press Translate.
cmd.undo_settings_done: Restored your previous settings (if there was a change to undo).
cmd.undo_settings_hint: Restore the previous lesson settings (not generated content)
cmd.voice_start_done: Voice control on. Say a command like “bigger text” or “open the educator hub”. Say “stop listening” to finish.
cmd.voice_start_hint: AlloBot listens for commands until you stop it
cmd.voice_stop_done: Voice control off — the microphone is released.
cmd.zen_on_done: Zen mode on — press Ctrl+K and run “exit zen” to come back.
palette.footer: Every action is announced. Ctrl+K toggles.
palette.no_match: No matching command. The bot chat (and soon voice) understands free-form requests.
palette.placeholder: Type a command — “bigger text”, “educator hub”, “read this page”…
